utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Now check full specification: 1) destination: specified. 2) travel_dates: specified. 3) transportation: only 'Budget Airlines, Economy Class, Estimated Cost: €125'—missing specific flight details (airline name, flight numbers, times), but the format only says 'flight details with costs'; this is vague and likely insufficient as 'details'. I'd mark as not fully specified. 4) accommodation: specified with name and cost; acceptable. 5) activities: listed with costs, but one item has a range and unspecified event; still 'selected activities with costs'—partially specified; likely acceptable but less detailed; however costs are included, albeit range. I'll count as included. 6) additional_services: 'None'—acceptable. 7) total_budget: 'Grand Total Estimated Range: €575 - €715' but lacks 'complete cost breakdown'—no itemized breakdown; not fully specified. Therefore included items fully specified: destination (1), travel_dates (2), accommodation (3), activities (4), additional_services (5). Transportation and total_budget not fully specified. That makes 5/7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package, the identifiable items that have corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings are: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic'; transportation 'Budget Airlines, Economy Class' which maps to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class; accommodation 'Adventure Lodge'; and activities 'City Walking Tour', 'Museum Day Pass', and 'Cultural Festival or Theater Show'. In the ground truth, 'Cultural Festival' exists (rating 9) and 'Theater Show' does not, so we map 'Cultural Festival'. No additional services were selected, so none to map.
